title: Pixies Allay
description: OptiFine Resources pack that adds pixies instead of Allays
body:
# Pixies instead of Allays?

## **Yes!**

![Pixies!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84113ec3b45297cd3f6b354b62313e5a892961fc.png)

Yes this is resource pack that retexture Allays into **Pixies!**

### OPTIFINE REQUIRED!
